evidence_preview.verified_quote: g Standard long-term small molecule treatment with 50 μM estradiol caused strong developmental defects with rudimentary head and axis in wild type embryos (arrowheads). h Pulse experiments of 50 μM estradiol from 10 hpf for four hours showed recovered head and axis structures (arrowheads) and specific myotome boundary disruptions of up to 13 segments (bracket). Inset shows disrupted boundaries. Wild type embryos at 36 hpf, in situ hybridization for xirp2a.

evidence_records.verified_quote: g Standard long-term small molecule treatment with 50 μM estradiol caused strong developmental defects with rudimentary head and axis in wild type embryos (arrowheads). h Pulse experiments of 50 μM estradiol from 10 hpf for four hours showed recovered head and axis structures (arrowheads) and specific myotome boundary disruptions of up to 13 segments (bracket). Inset shows disrupted boundaries. Wild type embryos at 36 hpf, in situ hybridization for xirp2a.

run_finished.response:
The extraction process identified a chemical condition related to estradiol treatment in embryonic zebrafish segmentation experiments. Here are the details:

- **Chemical**: Estradiol
- **Dose**: 50 µM
- **Timing**: From 10 hours post-fertilization (hpf) for four hours
- **Context**: Standard long-term small molecule treatment
- **Verified Quote**: "Standard long-term small molecule treatment with 50 µM estradiol caused strong developmental defects with rudimentary head and axis in wild type embryos (arrowheads). Pulse experiments of 50 µM estradiol from 10 hpf for four hours showed recovered head and axis structures (arrowheads) and specific myotome boundary disruptions of up to 13 segments (bracket). Inset shows disrupted boundaries. Wild type embryos at 36 hpf, in situ hybridization for xirp2a." (Page 5, Results section, Fig. 4)

This extraction captures the essential details of the estradiol treatment used in the study.

evidence_records.verified_quote: g Standard long-term small molecule treatment with 50 μM estradiol caused strong developmental defects with rudimentary head and axis in wild type embryos (arrowheads). h Pulse experiments of 50 μM estradiol from 10 hpf for four hours showed recovered head and axis structures (arrowheads) and specific myotome boundary disruptions of up to 13 segments (bracket). Inset shows disrupted boundaries. Wild type embryos at 36 hpf, in situ hybridization for xirp2a.

args.claimed_quote: Standard long-term small molecule treatment with 50 μM estradiol caused strong developmental defects with rudimentary head and axis in wild type embryos (arrowheads). Pulse experiments of 50 μM estradiol from 10 hpf for four hours showed recovered head and axis structures (arrowheads) and specific myotome boundary disruptions of up to 13 segments (bracket). Inset shows disrupted boundaries. Wild type embryos at 36 hpf, in situ hybridization for xirp2a.

Inset shows disrupted boundaries. Wild type embryos at 36 hpf, in situ hybridization for xirp2a.
